history.message: Measurement planning disabled; deterministic pre-enqueue advisory recorded.

tracking_cadence_policy.does_not_change: Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults

guidance.shot_preservation_guidance: When the predicted per-average tracking window is too long, first reduce repetitions per average and compensate by increasing averages so repetitions * averages remains as close as possible to the original total shots. If that is still insufficient, split the acquisition into shorter jobs. Reduce total shots only as a last resort.
adjustment_priority: raise averages to preserve repetitions * averages whenever possible
split the acquisition into shorter jobs before reducing total shots
reduce total shots only as a last resort

warnings: sequence manifest pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 is in staging status and should stay limited to validate/dry_run until promoted.
Validation succeeded without touching 23-C hardware paths.
Execute remains separately gated by bootstrap and local lab validation.
Applied acquisition settings from job.metadata: averages=4, repetitions=20000, average_continuously=0.
Forced experiment tracking_period=1 for bridge-configured runs.
notes: Preview uses execute metadata opt-in only.
Static preflight does not auto-launch the legacy GUI stack.
The hidden/invisible bootstrap path is still unverified on the Win7 lab stack.
Default execute remains blocked unless the separate lab-only queue gate opens the production bridge route.

drift_analysis.trace_aggregation_method: mean normalized raw brightness across selected readout traces
